heading: Automation of Food and Drug Administration
label: 379d Automation of Food and Drug Administration
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 711 of act , was renumbered section 731 by and is classified to .June 25, 1938Pub. L. 102–571section 379f of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Commissioner of Food and Drugs, shall automate appropriate activities of the Food and Drug Administration to ensure timely review of activities regulated under this chapter.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated each fiscal year such sums as are necessary to carry out this section.
